## What needs correcting?

<!-- Describe the issue with the data. Include the row or entry you're referring to if possible (e.g. threat description, source, aspect code). -->

## Where is the error?

- [ ] Threat description (paraphrased)
- [ ] Mitigation strategy description
- [ ] Independent opportunity description
- [ ] Verbatim quote
- [ ] Source / citation
- [ ] Democracy aspect code(s)
- [ ] Entry type (threat / mitigation pairing / independent opportunity)
- [ ] Missing entry — should be added
- [ ] Duplicate entry — should be merged or removed

## What should it say instead?

<!-- Provide the corrected text, code, or citation. If adding a new entry, include all relevant fields. -->

## Source / evidence

<!-- Link to the original report, paper, or document that supports the correction. -->
